---
title: atmos terraform cache prune
sidebar_label: cache prune
sidebar_class_name: command
id: prune
description: Remove stale cached registry metadata.
---
import Intro from '@site/src/components/Intro'
import Screengrab from '@site/src/components/Screengrab'

<Intro>
Remove cached registry metadata older than the retention window. Immutable artifacts (provider zips, module archives) are kept unless you opt in with `--all`.
</Intro>

<Screengrab title="atmos terraform cache prune --help" slug="atmos-terraform-cache-prune--help" />

## Usage

```shell
atmos terraform cache prune [flags]
```

## Flags

<dl>
  <dt>`--older-than`</dt>
  <dd>Prune objects older than this Go duration (e.g. `168h`, `720h`). Defaults to `168h`.</dd>
  <dt>`--all`</dt>
  <dd>Also prune immutable artifacts (provider zips, module archives), not just metadata.</dd>
  <dt>`--dry-run`</dt>
  <dd>Show what would be pruned without deleting anything.</dd>
</dl>

## Examples

```shell
# Prune metadata older than the default 168h window
atmos terraform cache prune

# Preview a more aggressive prune that also removes old artifacts
atmos terraform cache prune --older-than=720h --all --dry-run
```

## Related Commands

- [`atmos terraform cache stats`](/cli/commands/terraform/cache/stats)
- [`atmos terraform cache delete`](/cli/commands/terraform/cache/delete)
